name: heidisql
title: HeidiSQL
description: Search and open your HeidiSQL saved database connections directly from Raycast. Reads sessions from the Windows Registry and supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, SQLite, and more.
author: hjord

commands.name: search-connections
commands.title: Search HeidiSQL
commands.subtitle: HeidiSQL
commands.description: Search and open HeidiSQL database connections

preferences.name: heidisqlPath
preferences.title: HeidiSQL Executable Path
preferences.description: Path to heidisql.exe. Leave empty to auto-detect from Program Files.
